---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or a new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Y-Bro
---

## The problem

What pain point or limitation are you running into? Lead with the problem, not the solution.

## Proposed change

How would you like it to work? If you have multiple ideas, that's fine — list them.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about, and why are they worse?

## Scope

Which command(s) does this affect — `create`, `update`, `review`, `refresh`, or all of them?

## Additional context

Screenshots, mock-ups, links to similar features in other tools, etc.
